nodes.label: JPMorgan Chase
nodes.summary: Major bank concerned about competitive risks from AI disclosure requirements, investing heavily in AI while warning of cyber vulnerabilities.

nodes.label: Goldman Sachs
nodes.summary: Major bank expressing concerns over AI disclosure revealing proprietary advantages, potentially leading to litigation.

nodes.label: Morgan Stanley
nodes.summary: Bank aligned with peers in opposing prescriptive AI disclosure rules, advocating for industry-wide compliance coalitions.

nodes.label: Jerome Powell
nodes.summary: Fed Chair cautioning on AI-driven market volatility, emphasizing systemic risks in congressional testimony and FOMC discussions.

nodes.label: SEC
nodes.summary: Enforcing new AI disclosure rules for public companies, focusing on material risks and governance without prescriptive mandates.

nodes.label: Google
nodes.summary: Tech giant facing transparency mandates on model training data, resisting data disclosure due to IP concerns.

nodes.label: Microsoft
nodes.summary: Tech leader under SEC scrutiny for AI governance, lobbying against strict data transparency requirements.

nodes.label: Meta
nodes.summary: Facing pressure to disclose model training data risks, while resisting mandates that could expose low-wage labor practices.

nodes.label: Financial Services Forum
nodes.summary: Coalition of banks forming shared risk assessments and compliance strategies to mitigate AI disclosure costs and competitive risks.

nodes.label: Investor Advisory Committee
nodes.summary: Advocating for standardized AI disclosure rules to aid investors, pushing SEC for clearer guidance on materiality and governance.
